name: RABBIT-CAGE-BUG-35
title: README.md references dead .sh scripts and removed features (feature-scaffolder, breeder, file-bug.sh)
description: README.md lines 60-89 reference scripts and features that no longer exist or were renamed: '.claude/features/feature-scaffolder/scripts/new-feature.sh' (actual location: rabbit-cage/scripts/new-feature.py, no feature-scaffolder feature), '.claude/features/bug-filing/scripts/file-bug.sh' (now rabbit-file/scripts/file-item.py), '.claude/features/feature-scaffolder/spec.md' (referenced as a doc link), and '.claude/features/breeder/spec.md' (breeder feature was removed per test-obsolete-removed.py check 4). The README is the install entry point so dead references mislead all new users. Also the install instructions at line 33 use 'bash <(curl ... install.py)' which is broken because install.py is a Python script, not bash.

history.note: wave-4 cleanup; fixed in e10610a (impl) and 91f2c68 (tests)
